message.content: The top navigation bar is a **frosted glass pill bar** with rounded corners, a subtle border, and a shadow. It has a semi-transparent, glass-like appearance (with a dark background that blends with the page’s design) and contains the navigation items: “JSK”, “John Shannon”, “WORK”, “ABOUT”, “CONTACT”, “GET IN TOUCH”, and a toggle icon. The rounded, pill - shaped design, combined with the frosted glass effect (transparency + subtle shadow/border), makes it distinct from a plain flat transparent bar.
